title: Failure Diagnostic Table by Network Communication DTC

blocks.text: Failure Diagnostic Table by Network Communication DTC

rows: Rear wiper switch (RR WIPER AS) signal error (intermittent wipers do not operate), wiper switch does not auto-stop when turned OFF
Wiper switch (AS) signal error (intermittent wipers do not operate, wiper switch does not auto-stop when turned OFF)
Driver Door lock knob switch LOCK/UNLOCK signal input simultaneously
Headlight switch OFF position circuit abnormal
Headlight switch SMALL position circuit failure
Headlight switch AUTO position circuit failure
Headlight switch LO position circuit failure
Wiper switch MIST position circuit error
Wiper switch INT position circuit error
Wiper switch LOW position circuit error
Wiper switch HIGH position circuit error
MICU cannot receive communication from Combination Meter Control Unit
Combination meter (fuel meter sender unit) circuit error (disconnection)
Combination meter (fuel meter sender unit) circuit error (short circuit)
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive transmission from PGM-FI ECU
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive VSA frames sent from VSA Modulator Control Unit
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive communication from City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive EPS frames sent from the EPS Control Unit
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive SRS frames sent from SRS unit
Combination Meter Control Unit cannot receive communication from MICU
Disconnection of cord of internal air temperature sensor, sensor failure
Shorted cord of internal air temperature sensor, defective sensor
Disconnection of cord of outside temperature sensor, sensor failure
Short-circuited cord of outside temperature sensor, defective sensor
Disconnection of cord of solar radiation sensor, sensor failure
Short circuit in cord of solar radiation sensor, sensor failure
Evaporator Disconnection of sensor cord, sensor failure
Evaporator Shorted sensor cord, defective sensor
Disconnection of potentiometer of air mix motor
Short circuit of potentiometer of air mix motor
Mode Disconnection or short-circuit of motor cord
Blower Motor cord break, short, blown fuse, motor lock
Unable to receive wiper frames from MICU
Auto A/C control unit communication circuit error (BUS off)
Auto A/C control unit cannot receive communication from combination meter control unit
Auto Light Control Unit cannot receive communication from MICU
Auto Light Control Unit cannot receive communication from Combination Meter Control Unit
Honda Smart Key LF circuit failure or short circuit failure
Short circuit in driver door LF antenna line
Disconnection of driver door LF antenna line
Assisted door LF antenna Short circuit in line
Assistant Door LF Antenna Disconnection of line
Short circuit in rear bumper LF antenna line
Disconnection of rear bumper LF antenna line
Short circuit in front LF antenna line inside the vehicle
Disconnection of front LF antenna line inside the vehicle
Short circuit in the rear LF antenna line inside the vehicle
Disconnection of rear LF antenna line inside the vehicle
Honda Smart Key ECU cannot receive VSP/NE frames sent from the combination meter
Backup control Antenna disconnection or short circuit
Backup control unit Bus line failure (BUS off)
Backup control unit cannot receive communication from combination meter control unit
Electronic steering lock switch C or D failure
Electronic Steering Lock Motor Circuit Failure
Communication failure between smart power control unit and electronic steering lock
Communication failure between Smart Power Control Unit and Backup Control Unit
Communication error between Smart Power Control Unit and Honda Smart Key ECU
Smart Power Control Unit F-CAN communication circuit error (BUS off)
Communication error between Smart Power Control Unit and PGM-FI ECU
Communication error between Smart Power Control Unit and VSA Modulator Control Unit
Rear headlight leveling sensor circuit error
Vehicle speed sensor failure value detection
Abnormal value detection of speed sensor
Auto Leveling Control Unit cannot receive communication from MICU
Auto Leveling Control Unit cannot receive communication from Combination Meter Control Unit
